title: sesbania macrantha var. macrantha
intro: Sesbania macrantha var. macrantha is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as a type of sesbania or vegetable bean, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the digestive system. Sesbania macrantha var. macrantha can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in its native regions.
